findings.title: API gateway
findings.detail: Azure API Management fronts microservices with JWT validation, throttling policies, and partner-specific products.

findings.title: Mutual TLS
findings.detail: North-south traffic from strategic partners terminates client certificates issued by an internal enterprise CA.

findings.title: Developer portal
findings.detail: Sandbox subscriptions isolate partner onboarding examples from production APIM instances.

findings.title: Consumption tier
findings.detail: Initial rollout keeps API Manager on consumption until sustained RPS crosses the committed tier threshold.
